```{r loading packages, warning=FALSE, results='hide', message=FALSE}
library("formatR")
library("foreign")
library("ggplot2")
library("lme4")
library("poLCA")
library("reprex")
library("tidyr")
library("klippy")
library("dplyr")
library("haven")
library("psych")
library("Matrix")
library("lme4")
library("merTools")
library("sjPlot")
library("glmmTMB")
library("foreign")
library("gt")
library("tibble")
library("dplyr")
```

```{r loading data, cache=TRUE, results='hide', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

NEA2022 <- readRDS("data/processed/LCAfinal.rds")

attach(NEA2022)
set.seed(123)
```


```{r transform in factor, cache=TRUE}
#Transform in factor
NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(
    migration = trimws(migration),
    education = trimws(education),
    gender = trimws(gender),
    leeftijd = trimws(leeftijd)
  )

NEA2022$gender <- factor(NEA2022$gender, levels = c("m", "v"))
NEA2022$migration <- factor(NEA2022$migration,
                            levels = c("nl", "eu", "noeu"))
NEA2022$education <- factor(NEA2022$education,
                            levels = c("laag", "middel", "hoog"))
NEA2022$leeftijd <- factor(NEA2022$leeftijd,
                            levels = c("15.35", "35.55", "55.75"))
```


```{r}
NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_6 = pmodel7_empv6 * 100)
```





```{r}
# --- Model-based predicted probabilities + 95% CI from lmer model ---

#Regression
NEA2022 <- NEA2022 %>%
  mutate(model7_6 = pmodel7_empv6 * 100)

L_6_0 <- lmer(model7_6 ~ 1 + (1|intersections), data=NEA2022) 

L_6_g <- lmer(model7_6 ~ gender_v + (1 | intersections), data=NEA2022)

L_6_m <- lmer(model7_6 ~ migration_eu + migration_noeu  + (1 | intersections), data=NEA2022)

L_6_e <- lmer(model7_6 ~ education_laag + education_middel  + (1 | intersections), data=NEA2022)

L_6_a <- lmer(model7_6 ~ leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75  + (1 | intersections), data=NEA2022)

L_6_1 <- lmer(model7_6 ~ gender_v + migration_eu + migration_noeu + 
    education_laag + education_middel + leeftijd_35.55 + leeftijd_55.75  + (1 | intersections), data=NEA2022)

tab_model(L_6_0, L_6_g, L_6_m, L_6_e, L_6_a, L_6_1, p.style="stars")

cat("ICC model 0: ", 0.8319/(0.8319+115.2122), "\n",
    "ICC gender: ", 0.8588/(0.8588+115.2120), "\n",
    "ICC migration: ", 0.3866/(0.3866+115.2214), "\n",
    "ICC education: ", 0.6416/(0.6416+115.2140), "\n",
    "ICC age: ", 0.8895/(0.8895+115.2102), "\n",
    "ICC final: ", 0.1494/(0.1494+115.2260), "\n",
    "PCV: ", (0.8319-0.1494)/0.8319, "\n")
```


```{r}
# --- 1. Model-based predictions met 95% CI via parametric bootstrap ---
set.seed(123)
preds6_0 <- predictInterval(
  merMod = L_6_0,
  newdata = NEA2022,
  level = 0.95,
  n.sims = 1000,
  type = "linear.prediction",  # bij logistische modellen: "response"
  include.resid.var = FALSE
)

# Voeg voorspellingen toe aan data
NEA2022 <- cbind(NEA2022, preds6_0)

# --- 2. Groepeer per intersectionele groep ---
summary_preds_6_0 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_fit = mean(fit, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = mean(lwr, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper = mean(upr, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- 3. Labels ---
gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

# --- 4. Plot ---
ggplot(summary_preds_6_0, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_fit, color = gender)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    width = 0,
    alpha = 0.4,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(education),
    cols = vars(migration),
    labeller = labeller(
      education = education_labels,
      migration = migration_labels
    ),
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability of overall unsafety (Model 1)",
    subtitle = "95% model-based confidence intervals (merTools parametric simulation)",
    y = "Predicted Probability",
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
    labels = gender_labels
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability"))

```




```{r}
# --- 1. Model-based predictions met 95% CI via parametric bootstrap ---
set.seed(123)
preds6_1 <- predictInterval(
  merMod = L_6_1,
  newdata = NEA2022,
  level = 0.95,
  n.sims = 1000,
  type = "linear.prediction",  # bij logistische modellen: "response"
  include.resid.var = FALSE
)

# Voeg voorspellingen toe aan data
NEA2022 <- cbind(NEA2022, preds6_1)

# --- 2. Groepeer per intersectionele groep ---
summary_preds_6_1 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_fit = mean(fit, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = mean(lwr, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper = mean(upr, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- 3. Labels ---
gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

# --- 4. Plot ---
ggplot(summary_preds_6_1, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_fit, color = gender)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    width = 0,
    alpha = 0.4,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(education),
    cols = vars(migration),
    labeller = labeller(
      education = education_labels,
      migration = migration_labels
    ),
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability of overall unsafety (Model 1)",
    subtitle = "95% model-based confidence intervals (merTools parametric simulation)",
    y = "Predicted Probability",
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
    labels = gender_labels
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability"))

```


```{r}
pred_summary <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(intersections) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = mean(fit, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = mean(lwr, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper = mean(upr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pred_mean)) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

top10 <- pred_summary %>% slice(1:10) %>% mutate(type = "Top 10")
bottom10 <- pred_summary %>% slice((n() - 9):n()) %>% mutate(type = "Bottom 10")

df6 <- bind_rows(top10, bottom10)

df6 %>%
  select(rank, intersections, pred_mean, lower, upper) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Highest and lowest intersections probability overall unsafety**")
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c("pred_mean", "lower", "upper"),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = "rank", decimals = 0) %>%
  cols_label(
    intersections = md("**Intersections**"),
    pred_mean    = md("**Predicted probability**"),
    lower        = md("**95% CI lower**"),
    upper        = md("**95% CI upper**"),
    rank         = md("**Rank**")
  )

```







```{r estimated overall unsafety Model1, cache=TRUE}
#Model1: Predicted probability belonging to overall unsafety class

NEA2022$predicted_6 <- predict(L_6_1, re.form = NULL, type = "response")

NEA2022$residual_6 <- NEA2022$model7_6 - NEA2022$predicted_6

summary_preds_6 <- NEA2022 %>%
  group_by(gender, migration, education, leeftijd) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_6 = mean(predicted_6, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pred_6 = sd(residual_6, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "m" = "Men",
  "v" = "Women"
))

migration_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "nl"   = "No migration background",
  "eu"   = "European",
  "noeu" = "Non-European"
))

education_labels <- as_labeller(c(
  "laag"   = "Low",
  "middel" = "Middle",
  "hoog"   = "High"
))

ggplot(summary_preds_6, aes(x = leeftijd, y = mean_pred_6, color = gender)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_pred_6 - 1.96*se_pred_6,
                    ymax = mean_pred_6 + 1.96*se_pred_6),
                width = 0,
                alpha = 0.4,
                linewidth = 0.005
                ) + 
  facet_grid(rows = vars(education), cols = vars(migration),
             labeller = labeller(
               education = education_labels,
               migration = migration_labels
             ),
             switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted probability overall unsafety Model1",
    y = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    color = "Gender"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("m" = "steelblue", "v" = "tomato"),
                     labels = gender_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 10)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = NULL,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = "Predicted Probability")
  )
```
